title: Xunaa Shuká Hít (Huna Ancestors' House), Bartlett Cove
description: The Xunaa Shuká Hít (Huna Ancestors' House, the Huna Tribal House) at Bartlett Cove in Glacier Bay National Park, with a purple lupine wildflower meadow in the foreground, clan house posts flanking the painted façade, and Sitka spruce forest behind. Dedicated in 2016 as the first permanent clan house in Glacier Bay since Little Ice Age advances overran the Huna Tlingit villages in the 1700s.
alt: The Xunaa Shuká Hít Huna Ancestors' House with purple lupine flowers filling the foreground
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from nps.gov Huna Tribal House place page, visually confirmed
